backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Beast Clipping backend, defining data types (VideoClip, UserProfile, OAuth credentials, feedback submissions) and implementing clip management, similarity scoring, engagement calculation, and user profile logic with access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two related features for fixing the OAuthCallback page to wait for actor initialization before processing OAuth codes, rather than immediately failing with a 'Connection Failed' error.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, hooks, and configuration files in the React frontend.
frontend/.env: Environment file containing the Vite Google OAuth Client ID used for Google/YouTube authentication in the frontend.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file with detailed step-by-step instructions for obtaining and configuring a Google OAuth Client ID, including troubleshooting guidance.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard gitignore for a Vite/Node frontend project, excluding node_modules, build output, editor files, and environment variable files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Beast Clipping Vite app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up React Query, TanStack Router with routes for home, admin, and OAuth callback pages, and manages global feedback modal state via a RootLayout wrapper.
Displays a debug panel for admins showing authentication status, principal comparison, admin principals list, and initialization status with copy-to-clipboard and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React class-based error boundary that catches errors in the admin panel and displays error message, stack trace, and component stack with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Fetches and displays a list of admin principals using the useAdminList hook, showing each admin's short ID and full principal with loading and error states.
Provides a form to add a new admin by principal ID using the useAddAdmin hook, and renders the AdminList component below it.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard that displays stats, a collapsible debug panel, admin management, user status management, and feedback submissions sections with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: UI component for connecting or disconnecting a Google/YouTube account, showing channel info when connected and a connect button when not, using the useYouTubeChannel hook.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Renders a single video clip card with thumbnail, duration, viral score badge, and action buttons for deleting, downloading, and posting to YouTube, with confirmation dialogs and connection state checks.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, showing a loading spinner or empty state as needed, and delegating selection and deletion to parent via props.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clip suggestions with viral scores, allowing the user to select a suggestion to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Provides a form for setting start/end timestamps and a title to create and save a video clip, syncing fields when a clip or suggestion is selected externally.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: A dialog modal for submitting user feedback as either a feature request or bug report, with validation and form reset on close.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of all feedback submissions with type badges, submitter info, timestamps, and per-item delete functionality with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders the app header with navigation, authentication controls (Internet Identity login/logout), and conditional admin button visibility based on user role and owner status.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form component that collects a new user's name and email, then saves their profile to the backend with default 'user' role and 'active' status.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the authenticated user's short generated User ID and full Principal ID, each with a copy-to-clipboard button.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge for a given UserRole (owner, admin, user, friend) with a corresponding icon and color scheme, supporting three size variants.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin panel card that lists all users in a searchable table and allows changing each user's role and account status via dropdowns, using mutation hooks for backend updates.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for inputting and validating a YouTube URL, loading the video, and optionally triggering AI clip generation for the loaded video ID.
Displays a color-coded badge showing a viral potential score (0–100) with an appropriate icon and label based on score thresholds (high/medium/low).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Renders a responsive 16:9 YouTube iframe embed for a given video ID inside a Card component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Provides a mutation hook to add an admin by user ID via the backend actor, invalidating admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Fetches debug information about the current user's admin status using the backend actor, returning placeholder data for fields not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Fetches the list of admin principals from the backend using React Query, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Fetches admin statistics including total clip count and trending clip analytics from the backend, returning combined loading and error states.
Provides a mutation hook that calls the backend to auto-generate clip suggestions, falling back to mock AI-generated suggestions if the backend returns none.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to save a new video clip to the backend, calculating a viral potential score based on duration and title before submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Fetches all video clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation with per-clip deletion tracking state.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages start and end timestamp state (minutes/seconds) for clip creation, providing validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: Provides a mutation hook to delete a feedback submission by ID, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Provides a mutation hook that generates a download URL from the backend and triggers a browser file download for a video clip.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: Fetches all feedback submissions from the backend using React Query, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: Provides a mutation hook to submit user feedback to the backend, invalidating the submissions cache and showing toast notifications on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: Fetches the current authenticated user's role from the backend, returning null on error rather than throwing, and combining actor and query loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React Query hook that checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend `isCallerAdmin()` method, with detailed debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook that posts a video clip to YouTube Shorts via the backend actor, validating OAuth credentials and enforcing a 60-second duration limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profile CRUD, Google OAuth credential storage, and YouTube connection status checks against the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend `setUserRole` for a given principal and invalidates related role/owner queries, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: Mutation hook that updates a user's status via the backend `updateUserStatus` method and invalidates relevant queries, with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: Query hook that retrieves all user roles from the backend and enriches each entry with the user's profile and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Provides queries and mutations for checking, connecting (via Google OAuth redirect), and disconnecting a YouTube channel linked to the user's account.
Utility hook exposing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract 11-character video IDs from them.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: React page that handles the Google OAuth callback by waiting for the backend actor to become available (with a 15-second timeout), then extracts and validates URL params before storing the OAuth credentials via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting and clearing values via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Exports a single function that deterministically generates an 8-character base-36 user ID from a principal string using a simple hash algorithm.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Provides a YouTubeOAuthDebugger class with structured logging, OAuth response validation, and common error pattern matching to assist in debugging the YouTube OAuth flow.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, fonts, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two existing fix features aimed at preventing the OAuthCallback page from immediately failing when the backend actor is not yet initialized, and ensuring proper synchronization between actor initialization and OAuth callback processing.
